accommodations.text: State task expectations explicitly and in writing.
accommodations.source_quote: state task expectations explicitly and in writing

accommodations.text: Give advance warning before transitions and changes in routine.
accommodations.source_quote: advance warning before transitions and changes in routine

accommodations.text: Provide a checklist to break long assignments into steps.
accommodations.source_quote: checklist to break long assignments into steps

accommodations.text: Provide a word bank for written-response items in reading and history.
accommodations.source_quote: provide a word bank for written-response items

accommodations.text: Provide captions or a transcript for all audio and video media.
accommodations.source_quote: captions or a transcript for all audio and video media

services.source_quote: Language processing support group 30 minutes twice weekly; provider TBD
Specialized academic instruction mathematics 30 minutes 5 times weekly

goals.text: Marcus will use a taught script to join a peer activity in 3 of 4 structured opportunities.
goals.baseline: Joins a peer activity with adult prompting in 1 of 4 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: use a taught script to join a peer activity

goals.text: Jamal will organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Organizes a response without an outline in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: organize a multi-paragraph response using an outline

goals.text: Layla will independently report FM system problems to the teacher in 4 of 5 opportunities.
goals.baseline: Reports FM system problems with prompting in 1 of 5 opportunities.
goals.source_quote: independently report FM system problems in 4 of 5 opportunities

goals.text: Grace will produce three organized sentences on a topic in 4 of 5 samples.
goals.baseline: Produces one sentence on a topic in 2 of 5 samples.
goals.source_quote: produce three organized sentences on a topic
